$comment: Drop this in any project as .mcp.json (Claude Code) or copy contents under the .vscode/mcp.json 'servers' key for VS Code Copilot. Uses MEMORY_GRAPH_WORKSPACE so the per-repo DuckDB lives in <workspace>/.memory-graph/.

memory-graph.customInstructions: MANDATORY at task start: recall(query=<task>, top_k=5). After solving: record_finding(finding_type, title, content, related_files, tags). See PROTOCOL.md for the full operating manual.
